zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh於大約1255年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾時，他的父親Sir William Strickland33歲，母親Elisabeth d'Eyncourt20歲。他於大約1288年與Eleanor Goldington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1323年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1343年在英國維斯特莫藍德享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh于大约1255年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir William Strickland33岁，母亲Elisabeth d'Eyncourt20岁。他于大约1288年与Eleanor Goldington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1323年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1343年在英国維斯特莫藍德享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strickland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Great and Little Strickland (Westmorland) or Strickland Ketel and Strickland Roger (also Westmorland). The placenames derive from Old English stīrc ‘stirk, young bullock or heifer’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh was born about 1255, in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir William Strickland, was 33 and his mother, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, was 20. He married Eleanor Goldington about 1288. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1323. He died about 1343, in Westmorland, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh est né environ 1255, à Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Strickland, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Goldington environ 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1323. Il est décédé environ 1343, à Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh um 1255 in Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Strickland 33 und seine Mutter Elisabeth d'Eyncourt 20. Er hat um 1288 Eleanor Goldington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1323 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1343 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Westmorland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh è nato il circa 1255 nel Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir William Strickland, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Goldington circa 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1323. Morì circa 1343, nel Westmorland, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Strickland of Sizerghが約1255年にイギリスウエストモーランドシズエルグ ハルで生まれた時，父Sir William Stricklandは33歳，母Elisabeth d'Eyncourtは20歳であった。約1288年にEleanor Goldingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1323年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1343年にイギリスウエストモーランドで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 시즈르그h 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Strickland(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth d'Eyncourt(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 Eleanor Goldington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1343년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Sizergh Hall, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Strickland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Goldington aproximadamente 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1323. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1343, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Strickland of Sizergh родился около 1255 г. в местности сизирг холл, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Strickland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth d'Eyncourt, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Goldington около 1288 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1323 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1343 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.
